texto: Her eyes traveled down the black T-shirt he wore. Pfft, he might as well be naked. It clung to him like a second skin giving her a clear view of lean, hard muscles. She licked her lips. Gods, what it would feel like to be his T-shirt. She was positive if he turned around his ass would be considered a lethal weapon in those jeans.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Valerie Twombly: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Her eyes traveled down the black T-shirt he wore. Pfft, he might as well be naked. It clung to hi…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, paranormal-romance, shirt pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de viagem e reflexao.
